TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Tacuang lalood == Tacuang lalood, ano eca Likawang lalood, o cecay piliyang a malalood i sakowan no Mancin itiya. I 1888 miheca 8 folad 2 romi'ad, sa Posongan a sakowan a Lilongcuang a fa'elohay loma' nano mafolaway payrang ato yincumin (Taulong finacadan) , nawhani Panan pamatangay a iing ci Lei Fuhai a tapang mikelot ato misamsam to fafahiyan, saka mikerid to 700 tamdaw tayra i Tacuangci mipatay ci Lei Fuhai, midamaay ci Weng Yuan, He Mao, Wang Sheng aci Ci Yong itiya a malalood , ikor macowat mala no Kalinko Posong saowac dafdaf a kasaniyaro' no Taulong finacadan, 'Amis finacadan, Piwma finacadan, Ngayngay mimatangay malekapot a miliyang to Mancin sifo a kalaloodan. Faku Naikoran no Mutan lalood i, nao miasimanayay paomisarocoday ko sakowan no Mancin to Taywan itiya, saka misahalaka to salongoc to sofal i pasawalian no Taywan. I 1874 miheca Fucien tapang ci Shen Baozhen tayni mikantok to lilis to riyar no Taywan, maocor ci Yuan Wenzao a kakeridan pakatamina talasekal i Posong, patireng to satomolan mirikecay to yincumin, oya ci Yuan Wenzao ko citodongay, nanoya i sawalian no Taywan papatireng to ko citodongay no kitakit nanoyaan. Na mapatireng ko mirikecay to yincumin itiya i, maocor ko sofitay to 2000 tamdaw, masiiked nai 'amis, sifo'ay timolay matitolo micomod tayni i wali a sa'etal. Onini a demak o nai ci Liu Mingchuan ko misokoliway to sera caay ka lalen ato "mipangilos to yincumin" malo sakalatiih no finawlan. Mimatangay citodongay a kakeridan ci Lei Fuhai i pisokoliwan to sera misamsam to finawlan, mikelot safaya' to fafahiyan saka kaketeran no finawlan. Pakayraan no demak Misokoliway no Mancin a kakeridan micomod i sawalian sa'etal misokoliw to sera itiya, misanga' to moraraway a cuka mimangah, malengat ko Tacuang sa'etalan finawlan a maliyang. Kuangsi 14 miheca 6 folad 10 romi'ad, Tarawadaw citodongay ci Lei Fuhai iing, mingitangit misorot to sata tayra i Tacuang, kao payso ko sapasata sa ko pisaali, nawhani cango'ot ko micaliway to sera a malingaday, milongoc kao panay ko sapasata nasa, caay kahien ni Lei Fuhai, tatiih ko panangan ni Lei Fuhai mipakinali ko demak misamsam to fafahiyan no Tacuang niyaro', o nian ko katatiihan no finawlan. Ikor pakokot ci Lei Fuhai tayra i Pinan citodongay ci Chen Can to demak, mafana' ko citodongay o panay to ko sapasata, tangasa kaherekan palolol to sata, nanoya hayda sato. Saan i, i 6 folad 25 romi'ad 'ayaw no lahok, Tacuang sa'etal a Ngayngay tamdaw ci Liu Tianwang, yincumin ci Pan Shuisheng, Du Xing, ato i Takofanay ngayngay tamdaw ci Xie Jisheng aci Wu Tianfuci, fa'elohay niyaro' a Zhao Wenliang, kakitaan ci Xinkaiyuan, tatami sa tayra i mimatangay sakowan Tacuang kadademakan mifalic to nisokoliwan a tilid, nanoya masasicangal to 'aca ato mimatangay iing ci Lei Fuhai pakinali ko kalaliyang, saka halo ca Lei Fuhai, Weng Yuan, He Mao, Wang Sheng, aci Cha Yong a patayen, nanoya sakalamkam sato mitahidang to yincumin 700 ko tamdaw miliyang to Mancin itiya, malalood to ko finawlan toya dadaya mitekol lood to itiraay i Kohkoh a mimatangay citodongay, mipatay ci Gao Chengyao iing, misimaway ci Liu Deyou ato sofitay itiya. I 1888 miheca 8 folad 5 romi'ad, malitosa to ko sofitay a ilood, siiked pasitimol pasi'amis micomod. Nanoya malekapot to kakeridan no Ngayngay ci Zhang Zhaohui, Chen Zongxian malekatep, nai sawalian sa'etal Piyacon, Kacawan a niyaro', itiya kalallodan a micamol mikapot, saikor malengat to konini a demak. itiya sawalian saowacay kasaniyaro' a 'Amis finacadan, Tawulong finacadan masasicowat, mililis milefek to pikacawan sofitay no Mancin, matiraay saka, ikor itiraay i Posong sa'etal a Piwma Likapon ngasaw mikihatiya to lalood. (1) Ka'amisay lalood: tala'amis ko sofitay milood tayra i Kalingko minato, 8 folad 4 romi'ad, Tacuang a finawlan salongan 1000 tamdaw mcalap to Liyisan no Kotofoki, malowid ko malitemoh a sofitay no Mancin. I 26 romi'ad, itiraay Posko a 'Amis a salongan 2000 tamdaw mikihatiya a milood, o finawlan nai Cipaokan milo'is i pikacawan Wang Tingkai a minato no Kalingko a sofitay, misi'ayaw to sakotan a milood ato ni Li Desheng a sofitay ko picora' milood, nanoya macacora' to kakeridan no minato ci Chen Deyi ato Cikasoan tamdaw ko pilaop, mapatayay finawlan ira ko 31 tamdaw, ka'aisay a lalood nanoya paterep sato. (2) Katimolay lalood: Katimolay micomod i dafdaf no Posong, malekatep to Piwma finacadan Likafon ngasaw, padoedo misadadahal to lalood, micalapan todohan ko kaitiraan no tapatapang, loyokan ko sofitay. Pasitimol ko finawlan sofitay i Piwma kaitiraan, 6 folad 28 romi'ad, Tacuang ato Likafon sangasaw salongan 1000 tamdaw miliyok to sofitay ni Zhang Zhaolian, 8 folad 14 romi'ad, ci Ding Ruchang haki riyar no Posong ko lood to pikifian no Likafon ngasaw, i 15 romi'ad to dafak, pili'an ko sofitay no Mancin to 300 ko ci'icelay, pa'aca to payso, ilecad to sofitay ni Ding Ruchang a milood, saka alowid ko 5 pikifian milood to Pangpangan ngasaw. I 16 romi'ad, ci Li Dingming, Wan Guoben, Ding Ruchang, Wu Hongluo lacinowas sa ko cora', milood, miloyok to Likafon, Tamalakao ngasaw, cimapatayay no ngasaw salongan 100 ko tamdaw, saki Piwma a lalood nanoya sa paherek. Ikor, o citodongay no Mancin ci Li Dingming a tamina, tatapangan no sofitay i Taywan ci Wan Guoben, 'amisan tamina Zhiyuan, Jingyuan. Tosaay tamina a sofitay pala riyaray sakapot, pasa'amis milood tangasa i Kalingko minato, talatimol ilood to Piwma sakowan, nanoya o Ngangay finacadan, yincumin, saowacay kasaniyaro' ngasaw 'Amis finacadan, Taulong finacadan, Payrang mimatangay micaol i kalaloodan. Na salifong a sadama ko katalasekal milood, tangasa 8 folad ko lalood itiya malowid, toya mihecaan 10 folad paherek konini a demak. masa'sa' ko na lalood, kinsa han ko ngangan halo Kohkohan ci Zhang Zhaohui, Chen Zongxian (Kantonis tamdaw), Tacuang kakeridan ci Du Xingfang, Liu Rong, ato Posko, Ngayngay (Yilan Picen), Kacawan a yincumin kakeridan. Opi "tangafolan ko mingafolay" pilitado to Cikasoan 'Amis ko mami "korac" to niyah sana demak . Ikoray Picaliwan minengneng 2.大庄 Pinengnengan to tilid 2. . pedia.cloud.edu.tw. (2018-06-02). (原始內容存檔於2021-01-28).
S.PHON: == taʦo~u~uaŋ ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ == taʦo~u~uaŋ ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, ano~u əʦa ɾikawaŋ ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, o~u ʦəʦaj piɾijaŋ a maɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i sako~uwan no~u manʦin itija. i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, sa po~uso~uŋan a sako~uwan a ɾiɾo~uŋʦo~u~uaŋ a faʡəɾo~uħaj ɾo~umaʡ nano~u mafo~uɾawaj pajraŋ ato~u jinʦo~u~umin (tao~u~uɾo~uŋ finaʦaɬ~ɮan) , nawħani panan pamataŋaj a iiŋ ʦi ɾəi fo~u~uħai a tapaŋ mikəɾo~ut ato~u misamsam to~u fafaħijan, saka mikəriɬ~ɮ to~u *** tamɬ~ɮaw tajra i taʦo~u~uaŋʦi mipataj ʦi ɾəi fo~u~uħai, miɬ~ɮamaaj ʦi wəŋ jo~u~uan, ħə mao~u, waŋ sħəŋ aʦi ʦi jo~uŋ itija a maɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ , iko~ur maʦo~uwat maɾa no~u kaɾinko~u po~uso~uŋ sao~uwaʦ ɬ~ɮafɬ~ɮaf a kasanijaro~uʡ no~u tao~u~uɾo~uŋ finaʦaɬ~ɮan, ʡamis finaʦaɬ~ɮan, piwma finaʦaɬ~ɮan, ŋajŋaj mimataŋaj maɾəkapo~ut a miɾijaŋ to~u manʦin sifo~u a kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan. fako~u~u naiko~uran no~u mo~u~utan ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i, nao~u miasimanajaj pao~umisaro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮaj ko~u sako~uwan no~u manʦin to~u tajwan itija, saka misaħaɾaka to~u saɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u so~ufaɾ i pasawaɾian no~u tajwan. i **** miħəʦa fo~u~uʦiən tapaŋ ʦi sħən b~b~vao~u*ħən tajni mikanto~uk to~u ɾiɾis to~u rijar no~u tajwan, mao~uʦo~ur ʦi jo~u~uan wən*ao~u a kakəriɬ~ɮan pakatamina taɾasəkaɾ i po~uso~uŋ, patirəŋ to~u sato~umo~uɾan mirikəʦaj to~u jinʦo~u~umin, o~uja ʦi jo~u~uan wən*ao~u ko~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj, nano~uja i sawaɾian no~u tajwan papatirəŋ to~u ko~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj no~u kitakit nano~ujaan. na mapatirəŋ ko~u mirikəʦaj to~u jinʦo~u~umin itija i, mao~uʦo~ur ko~u so~ufitaj to~u **** tamɬ~ɮaw, masiikəɬ~ɮ nai ʡamis, sifo~uʡaj timo~uɾaj matito~uɾo~u miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ tajni i waɾi a saʡətaɾ. o~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak o~u nai ʦi ɾio~u~u miŋʦħo~u~uan ko~u miso~uko~uɾiwaj to~u səra ʦaaj ka ɾaɾən ato~u "mipaŋiɾo~us to~u jinʦo~u~umin" maɾo~u sakaɾatiiħ no~u finawɾan. mimataŋaj ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj a kakəriɬ~ɮan ʦi ɾəi fo~u~uħai i piso~uko~uɾiwan to~u səra misamsam to~u finawɾan, mikəɾo~ut safajaʡ to~u fafaħijan saka kakətəran no~u finawɾan. pakajraan no~u ɬ~ɮəmak miso~uko~uɾiwaj no~u manʦin a kakəriɬ~ɮan miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i sawaɾian saʡətaɾ miso~uko~uɾiw to~u səra itija, misaŋaʡ to~u mo~urarawaj a ʦo~u~uka mimaŋaħ, maɾəŋat ko~u taʦo~u~uaŋ saʡətaɾan finawɾan a maɾijaŋ. ko~u~uaŋsi ** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, tarawaɬ~ɮaw ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj ʦi ɾəi fo~u~uħai iiŋ, miŋitaŋit miso~uro~ut to~u sata tajra i taʦo~u~uaŋ, kao~u pajso~u ko~u sapasata sa ko~u pisaaɾi, nawħani ʦaŋo~uʡo~ut ko~u miʦaɾiwaj to~u səra a maɾiŋaɬ~ɮaj, miɾo~uŋo~uʦ kao~u panaj ko~u sapasata nasa, ʦaaj kaħiən ni ɾəi fo~u~uħai, tatiiħ ko~u panaŋan ni ɾəi fo~u~uħai mipakinaɾi ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak misamsam to~u fafaħijan no~u taʦo~u~uaŋ nijaro~uʡ, o~u nian ko~u katatiiħan no~u finawɾan. iko~ur pako~uko~ut ʦi ɾəi fo~u~uħai tajra i pinan ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj ʦi ʦħən ʦan to~u ɬ~ɮəmak, mafanaʡ ko~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj o~u panaj to~u ko~u sapasata, taŋasa kaħərəkan paɾo~uɾo~uɾ to~u sata, nano~uja ħajɬ~ɮa sato~u. saan i, i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ʡajaw no~u ɾaħo~uk, taʦo~u~uaŋ saʡətaɾ a ŋajŋaj tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi ɾio~u~u tianwaŋ, jinʦo~u~umin ʦi pan sħo~u~uisħəŋ, ɬ~ɮo~u~u xiŋ, ato~u i tako~ufanaj ŋajŋaj tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi xiə *isħəŋ aʦi wo~u~u tianfo~u~uʦi, faʡəɾo~uħaj nijaro~uʡ a *ħao~u wənɾiaŋ, kakitaan ʦi xinkaijo~u~uan, tatami sa tajra i mimataŋaj sako~uwan taʦo~u~uaŋ kaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakan mifaɾiʦ to~u niso~uko~uɾiwan a tiɾiɬ~ɮ, nano~uja masasiʦaŋaɾ to~u ʡaʦa ato~u mimataŋaj iiŋ ʦi ɾəi fo~u~uħai pakinaɾi ko~u kaɾaɾijaŋ, saka ħaɾo~u ʦa ɾəi fo~u~uħai, wəŋ jo~u~uan, ħə mao~u, waŋ sħəŋ, aʦi ʦħa jo~uŋ a patajən, nano~uja sakaɾamkam sato~u mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ to~u jinʦo~u~umin *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw miɾijaŋ to~u manʦin itija, maɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u ko~u finawɾan to~uja ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja mitəko~uɾ ɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u itiraaj i ko~uħko~uħ a mimataŋaj ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj, mipataj ʦi *ao~u ʦħəŋjao~u iiŋ, misimawaj ʦi ɾio~u~u ɬ~ɮəjo~uo~u~u ato~u so~ufitaj itija. i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, maɾito~usa to~u ko~u so~ufitaj a iɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, siikəɬ~ɮ pasitimo~uɾ pasiʡamis miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ. nano~uja maɾəkapo~ut to~u kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u ŋajŋaj ʦi *ħaŋ *ħao~uħo~u~ui, ʦħən *o~uŋxian maɾəkatəp, nai sawaɾian saʡətaɾ pijaʦo~un, kaʦawan a nijaro~uʡ, itija kaɾaɾɾo~uɬ~ɮan a miʦamo~uɾ mikapo~ut, saiko~ur maɾəŋat to~u ko~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak. itija sawaɾian sao~uwaʦaj kasanijaro~uʡ a ʡamis finaʦaɬ~ɮan, tawo~u~uɾo~uŋ finaʦaɬ~ɮan masasiʦo~uwat, miɾiɾis miɾəfək to~u pikaʦawan so~ufitaj no~u manʦin, matiraaj saka, iko~ur itiraaj i po~uso~uŋ saʡətaɾ a piwma ɾikapo~un ŋasaw mikiħatija to~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ. (*) kaʡamisaj ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ: taɾaʡamis ko~u so~ufitaj miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ tajra i kaɾiŋko~u minato~u, * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, taʦo~u~uaŋ a finawɾan saɾo~uŋan **** tamɬ~ɮaw mʦaɾap to~u ɾijisan no~u ko~uto~ufo~uki, maɾo~uwiɬ~ɮ ko~u maɾitəmo~uħ a so~ufitaj no~u manʦin. i ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, itiraaj po~usko~u a ʡamis a saɾo~uŋan **** tamɬ~ɮaw mikiħatija a miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, o~u finawɾan nai ʦipao~ukan miɾo~uʡis i pikaʦawan waŋ tiŋkai a minato~u no~u kaɾiŋko~u a so~ufitaj, misiʡajaw to~u sako~utan a miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ ato~u ni ɾi ɬ~ɮəsħəŋ a so~ufitaj ko~u piʦo~uraʡ miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, nano~uja maʦaʦo~uraʡ to~u kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u minato~u ʦi ʦħən ɬ~ɮəji ato~u ʦikaso~uan tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u piɾao~up, mapatajaj finawɾan ira ko~u ** tamɬ~ɮaw, kaʡaisaj a ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ nano~uja patərəp sato~u. (*) katimo~uɾaj ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ: katimo~uɾaj miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i ɬ~ɮafɬ~ɮaf no~u po~uso~uŋ, maɾəkatəp to~u piwma finaʦaɬ~ɮan ɾikafo~un ŋasaw, paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u misaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaħaɾ to~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, miʦaɾapan to~uɬ~ɮo~uħan ko~u kaitiraan no~u tapatapaŋ, ɾo~ujo~ukan ko~u so~ufitaj. pasitimo~uɾ ko~u finawɾan so~ufitaj i piwma kaitiraan, * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, taʦo~u~uaŋ ato~u ɾikafo~un saŋasaw saɾo~uŋan **** tamɬ~ɮaw miɾijo~uk to~u so~ufitaj ni *ħaŋ *ħao~uɾian, * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ʦi ɬ~ɮiŋ ro~u~uʦħaŋ ħaki rijar no~u po~uso~uŋ ko~u ɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u pikifian no~u ɾikafo~un ŋasaw, i ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ to~u ɬ~ɮafak, piɾiʡan ko~u so~ufitaj no~u manʦin to~u *** ko~u ʦiʡiʦəɾaj, paʡaʦa to~u pajso~u, iɾəʦaɬ~ɮ to~u so~ufitaj ni ɬ~ɮiŋ ro~u~uʦħaŋ a miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, saka aɾo~uwiɬ~ɮ ko~u * pikifian miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u paŋpaŋan ŋasaw. i ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ʦi ɾi ɬ~ɮiŋmiŋ, wan *o~u~uo~ub~b~vən, ɬ~ɮiŋ ro~u~uʦħaŋ, wo~u~u ħo~uŋɾo~u~uo~u ɾaʦino~uwas sa ko~u ʦo~uraʡ, miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, miɾo~ujo~uk to~u ɾikafo~un, tamaɾakao~u ŋasaw, ʦimapatajaj no~u ŋasaw saɾo~uŋan *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw, saki piwma a ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ nano~uja sa paħərək. iko~ur, o~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj no~u manʦin ʦi ɾi ɬ~ɮiŋmiŋ a tamina, tatapaŋan no~u so~ufitaj i tajwan ʦi wan *o~u~uo~ub~b~vən, ʡamisan tamina *ħijo~u~uan, *iŋjo~u~uan. to~usaaj tamina a so~ufitaj paɾa rijaraj sakapo~ut, pasaʡamis miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ taŋasa i kaɾiŋko~u minato~u, taɾatimo~uɾ iɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u piwma sako~uwan, nano~uja o~u ŋaŋaj finaʦaɬ~ɮan, jinʦo~u~umin, sao~uwaʦaj kasanijaro~uʡ ŋasaw ʡamis finaʦaɬ~ɮan, tao~u~uɾo~uŋ finaʦaɬ~ɮan, pajraŋ mimataŋaj miʦao~uɾ i kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan. na saɾifo~uŋ a saɬ~ɮama ko~u kataɾasəkaɾ miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, taŋasa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ko~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ itija maɾo~uwiɬ~ɮ, to~uja miħəʦaan ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ paħərək ko~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak. masaʡsaʡ ko~u na ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, kinsa ħan ko~u ŋaŋan ħaɾo~u ko~uħko~uħan ʦi *ħaŋ *ħao~uħo~u~ui, ʦħən *o~uŋxian (kanto~unis tamɬ~ɮaw), taʦo~u~uaŋ kakəriɬ~ɮan ʦi ɬ~ɮo~u~u xiŋfaŋ, ɾio~u~u ro~uŋ, ato~u po~usko~u, ŋajŋaj (jiɾan piʦən), kaʦawan a jinʦo~u~umin kakəriɬ~ɮan. o~upi "taŋafo~uɾan ko~u miŋafo~uɾaj" piɾitaɬ~ɮo~u to~u ʦikaso~uan ʡamis ko~u mami "ko~uraʦ" to~u nijaħ sana ɬ~ɮəmak . iko~uraj piʦaɾiwan minəŋnəŋ *.** pinəŋnəŋan to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ *. . pəɬ~ɮia.ʦɾo~uo~u~uɬ~ɮ.əɬ~ɮo~u~u.tw. (****-**-**). (***********-**-**).
S.FORM: == Tacuang lalood == Tacuang lalood, ano eca Likawang lalood, o cecay piliyang a malalood i sakowan no Mancin itiya. I 1888 miheca 8 folad 2 romi'ad, sa Posongan a sakowan a Lilongcuang a fa'elohay loma' nano mafolaway payrang ato yincumin (Taulong finacadan) , nawhani Panan pamatangay a iing ci Lei Fuhai a tapang mikelot ato misamsam to fafahiyan, saka mikerid to 700 tamdaw tayra i Tacuangci mipatay ci Lei Fuhai, midamaay ci Weng Yuan, He Mao, Wang Sheng aci Ci Yong itiya a malalood , ikor macowat mala no Kalinko Posong saowac dafdaf a kasaniyaro' no Taulong finacadan, 'Amis finacadan, Piwma finacadan, Ngayngay mimatangay malekapot a miliyang to Mancin sifo a kalaloodan. Faku Naikoran no Mutan lalood i, nao miasimanayay paomisarocoday ko sakowan no Mancin to Taywan itiya, saka misahalaka to salongoc to sofal i pasawalian no Taywan. I 1874 miheca Fucien tapang ci Shen Baozhen tayni mikantok to lilis to riyar no Taywan, maocor ci Yuan Wenzao a kakeridan pakatamina talasekal i Posong, patireng to satomolan mirikecay to yincumin, oya ci Yuan Wenzao ko citodongay, nanoya i sawalian no Taywan papatireng to ko citodongay no kitakit nanoyaan. Na mapatireng ko mirikecay to yincumin itiya i, maocor ko sofitay to 2000 tamdaw, masiiked nai 'amis, sifo'ay timolay matitolo micomod tayni i wali a sa'etal. Onini a demak o nai ci Liu Mingchuan ko misokoliway to sera caay ka lalen ato "mipangilos to yincumin" malo sakalatiih no finawlan. Mimatangay citodongay a kakeridan ci Lei Fuhai i pisokoliwan to sera misamsam to finawlan, mikelot safaya' to fafahiyan saka kaketeran no finawlan. Pakayraan no demak Misokoliway no Mancin a kakeridan micomod i sawalian sa'etal misokoliw to sera itiya, misanga' to moraraway a cuka mimangah, malengat ko Tacuang sa'etalan finawlan a maliyang. Kuangsi 14 miheca 6 folad 10 romi'ad, Tarawadaw citodongay ci Lei Fuhai iing, mingitangit misorot to sata tayra i Tacuang, kao payso ko sapasata sa ko pisaali, nawhani cango'ot ko micaliway to sera a malingaday, milongoc kao panay ko sapasata nasa, caay kahien ni Lei Fuhai, tatiih ko panangan ni Lei Fuhai mipakinali ko demak misamsam to fafahiyan no Tacuang niyaro', o nian ko katatiihan no finawlan. Ikor pakokot ci Lei Fuhai tayra i Pinan citodongay ci Chen Can to demak, mafana' ko citodongay o panay to ko sapasata, tangasa kaherekan palolol to sata, nanoya hayda sato. Saan i, i 6 folad 25 romi'ad 'ayaw no lahok, Tacuang sa'etal a Ngayngay tamdaw ci Liu Tianwang, yincumin ci Pan Shuisheng, Du Xing, ato i Takofanay ngayngay tamdaw ci Xie Jisheng aci Wu Tianfuci, fa'elohay niyaro' a Zhao Wenliang, kakitaan ci Xinkaiyuan, tatami sa tayra i mimatangay sakowan Tacuang kadademakan mifalic to nisokoliwan a tilid, nanoya masasicangal to 'aca ato mimatangay iing ci Lei Fuhai pakinali ko kalaliyang, saka halo ca Lei Fuhai, Weng Yuan, He Mao, Wang Sheng, aci Cha Yong a patayen, nanoya sakalamkam sato mitahidang to yincumin 700 ko tamdaw miliyang to Mancin itiya, malalood to ko finawlan toya dadaya mitekol lood to itiraay i Kohkoh a mimatangay citodongay, mipatay ci Gao Chengyao iing, misimaway ci Liu Deyou ato sofitay itiya. I 1888 miheca 8 folad 5 romi'ad, malitosa to ko sofitay a ilood, siiked pasitimol pasi'amis micomod. Nanoya malekapot to kakeridan no Ngayngay ci Zhang Zhaohui, Chen Zongxian malekatep, nai sawalian sa'etal Piyacon, Kacawan a niyaro', itiya kalallodan a micamol mikapot, saikor malengat to konini a demak. itiya sawalian saowacay kasaniyaro' a 'Amis finacadan, Tawulong finacadan masasicowat, mililis milefek to pikacawan sofitay no Mancin, matiraay saka, ikor itiraay i Posong sa'etal a Piwma Likapon ngasaw mikihatiya to lalood. (1) Ka'amisay lalood: tala'amis ko sofitay milood tayra i Kalingko minato, 8 folad 4 romi'ad, Tacuang a finawlan salongan 1000 tamdaw mcalap to Liyisan no Kotofoki, malowid ko malitemoh a sofitay no Mancin. I 26 romi'ad, itiraay Posko a 'Amis a salongan 2000 tamdaw mikihatiya a milood, o finawlan nai Cipaokan milo'is i pikacawan Wang Tingkai a minato no Kalingko a sofitay, misi'ayaw to sakotan a milood ato ni Li Desheng a sofitay ko picora' milood, nanoya macacora' to kakeridan no minato ci Chen Deyi ato Cikasoan tamdaw ko pilaop, mapatayay finawlan ira ko 31 tamdaw, ka'aisay a lalood nanoya paterep sato. (2) Katimolay lalood: Katimolay micomod i dafdaf no Posong, malekatep to Piwma finacadan Likafon ngasaw, padoedo misadadahal to lalood, micalapan todohan ko kaitiraan no tapatapang, loyokan ko sofitay. Pasitimol ko finawlan sofitay i Piwma kaitiraan, 6 folad 28 romi'ad, Tacuang ato Likafon sangasaw salongan 1000 tamdaw miliyok to sofitay ni Zhang Zhaolian, 8 folad 14 romi'ad, ci Ding Ruchang haki riyar no Posong ko lood to pikifian no Likafon ngasaw, i 15 romi'ad to dafak, pili'an ko sofitay no Mancin to 300 ko ci'icelay, pa'aca to payso, ilecad to sofitay ni Ding Ruchang a milood, saka alowid ko 5 pikifian milood to Pangpangan ngasaw. I 16 romi'ad, ci Li Dingming, Wan Guoben, Ding Ruchang, Wu Hongluo lacinowas sa ko cora', milood, miloyok to Likafon, Tamalakao ngasaw, cimapatayay no ngasaw salongan 100 ko tamdaw, saki Piwma a lalood nanoya sa paherek. Ikor, o citodongay no Mancin ci Li Dingming a tamina, tatapangan no sofitay i Taywan ci Wan Guoben, 'amisan tamina Zhiyuan, Jingyuan. Tosaay tamina a sofitay pala riyaray sakapot, pasa'amis milood tangasa i Kalingko minato, talatimol ilood to Piwma sakowan, nanoya o Ngangay finacadan, yincumin, saowacay kasaniyaro' ngasaw 'Amis finacadan, Taulong finacadan, Payrang mimatangay micaol i kalaloodan. Na salifong a sadama ko katalasekal milood, tangasa 8 folad ko lalood itiya malowid, toya mihecaan 10 folad paherek konini a demak. masa'sa' ko na lalood, kinsa han ko ngangan halo Kohkohan ci Zhang Zhaohui, Chen Zongxian (Kantonis tamdaw), Tacuang kakeridan ci Du Xingfang, Liu Rong, ato Posko, Ngayngay (Yilan Picen), Kacawan a yincumin kakeridan. Opi "tangafolan ko mingafolay" pilitado to Cikasoan 'Amis ko mami "korac" to niyah sana demak . Ikoray Picaliwan minengneng 2.大庄 Pinengnengan to tilid 2. . pedia.cloud.edu.tw. (2018-06-02). (原始內容存檔於2021-01-28).
S.PHON: == taʦo~u~uaŋ ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ == taʦo~u~uaŋ ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, ano~u əʦa ɾikawaŋ ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, o~u ʦəʦaj piɾijaŋ a maɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i sako~uwan no~u manʦin itija. i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, sa po~uso~uŋan a sako~uwan a ɾiɾo~uŋʦo~u~uaŋ a faʡəɾo~uħaj ɾo~umaʡ nano~u mafo~uɾawaj pajraŋ ato~u jinʦo~u~umin (tao~u~uɾo~uŋ finaʦaɬ~ɮan) , nawħani panan pamataŋaj a iiŋ ʦi ɾəi fo~u~uħai a tapaŋ mikəɾo~ut ato~u misamsam to~u fafaħijan, saka mikəriɬ~ɮ to~u *** tamɬ~ɮaw tajra i taʦo~u~uaŋʦi mipataj ʦi ɾəi fo~u~uħai, miɬ~ɮamaaj ʦi wəŋ jo~u~uan, ħə mao~u, waŋ sħəŋ aʦi ʦi jo~uŋ itija a maɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ , iko~ur maʦo~uwat maɾa no~u kaɾinko~u po~uso~uŋ sao~uwaʦ ɬ~ɮafɬ~ɮaf a kasanijaro~uʡ no~u tao~u~uɾo~uŋ finaʦaɬ~ɮan, ʡamis finaʦaɬ~ɮan, piwma finaʦaɬ~ɮan, ŋajŋaj mimataŋaj maɾəkapo~ut a miɾijaŋ to~u manʦin sifo~u a kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan. fako~u~u naiko~uran no~u mo~u~utan ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i, nao~u miasimanajaj pao~umisaro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮaj ko~u sako~uwan no~u manʦin to~u tajwan itija, saka misaħaɾaka to~u saɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u so~ufaɾ i pasawaɾian no~u tajwan. i **** miħəʦa fo~u~uʦiən tapaŋ ʦi sħən b~b~vao~u*ħən tajni mikanto~uk to~u ɾiɾis to~u rijar no~u tajwan, mao~uʦo~ur ʦi jo~u~uan wən*ao~u a kakəriɬ~ɮan pakatamina taɾasəkaɾ i po~uso~uŋ, patirəŋ to~u sato~umo~uɾan mirikəʦaj to~u jinʦo~u~umin, o~uja ʦi jo~u~uan wən*ao~u ko~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj, nano~uja i sawaɾian no~u tajwan papatirəŋ to~u ko~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj no~u kitakit nano~ujaan. na mapatirəŋ ko~u mirikəʦaj to~u jinʦo~u~umin itija i, mao~uʦo~ur ko~u so~ufitaj to~u **** tamɬ~ɮaw, masiikəɬ~ɮ nai ʡamis, sifo~uʡaj timo~uɾaj matito~uɾo~u miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ tajni i waɾi a saʡətaɾ. o~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak o~u nai ʦi ɾio~u~u miŋʦħo~u~uan ko~u miso~uko~uɾiwaj to~u səra ʦaaj ka ɾaɾən ato~u "mipaŋiɾo~us to~u jinʦo~u~umin" maɾo~u sakaɾatiiħ no~u finawɾan. mimataŋaj ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj a kakəriɬ~ɮan ʦi ɾəi fo~u~uħai i piso~uko~uɾiwan to~u səra misamsam to~u finawɾan, mikəɾo~ut safajaʡ to~u fafaħijan saka kakətəran no~u finawɾan. pakajraan no~u ɬ~ɮəmak miso~uko~uɾiwaj no~u manʦin a kakəriɬ~ɮan miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i sawaɾian saʡətaɾ miso~uko~uɾiw to~u səra itija, misaŋaʡ to~u mo~urarawaj a ʦo~u~uka mimaŋaħ, maɾəŋat ko~u taʦo~u~uaŋ saʡətaɾan finawɾan a maɾijaŋ. ko~u~uaŋsi ** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, tarawaɬ~ɮaw ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj ʦi ɾəi fo~u~uħai iiŋ, miŋitaŋit miso~uro~ut to~u sata tajra i taʦo~u~uaŋ, kao~u pajso~u ko~u sapasata sa ko~u pisaaɾi, nawħani ʦaŋo~uʡo~ut ko~u miʦaɾiwaj to~u səra a maɾiŋaɬ~ɮaj, miɾo~uŋo~uʦ kao~u panaj ko~u sapasata nasa, ʦaaj kaħiən ni ɾəi fo~u~uħai, tatiiħ ko~u panaŋan ni ɾəi fo~u~uħai mipakinaɾi ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak misamsam to~u fafaħijan no~u taʦo~u~uaŋ nijaro~uʡ, o~u nian ko~u katatiiħan no~u finawɾan. iko~ur pako~uko~ut ʦi ɾəi fo~u~uħai tajra i pinan ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj ʦi ʦħən ʦan to~u ɬ~ɮəmak, mafanaʡ ko~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj o~u panaj to~u ko~u sapasata, taŋasa kaħərəkan paɾo~uɾo~uɾ to~u sata, nano~uja ħajɬ~ɮa sato~u. saan i, i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ʡajaw no~u ɾaħo~uk, taʦo~u~uaŋ saʡətaɾ a ŋajŋaj tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi ɾio~u~u tianwaŋ, jinʦo~u~umin ʦi pan sħo~u~uisħəŋ, ɬ~ɮo~u~u xiŋ, ato~u i tako~ufanaj ŋajŋaj tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi xiə *isħəŋ aʦi wo~u~u tianfo~u~uʦi, faʡəɾo~uħaj nijaro~uʡ a *ħao~u wənɾiaŋ, kakitaan ʦi xinkaijo~u~uan, tatami sa tajra i mimataŋaj sako~uwan taʦo~u~uaŋ kaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakan mifaɾiʦ to~u niso~uko~uɾiwan a tiɾiɬ~ɮ, nano~uja masasiʦaŋaɾ to~u ʡaʦa ato~u mimataŋaj iiŋ ʦi ɾəi fo~u~uħai pakinaɾi ko~u kaɾaɾijaŋ, saka ħaɾo~u ʦa ɾəi fo~u~uħai, wəŋ jo~u~uan, ħə mao~u, waŋ sħəŋ, aʦi ʦħa jo~uŋ a patajən, nano~uja sakaɾamkam sato~u mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ to~u jinʦo~u~umin *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw miɾijaŋ to~u manʦin itija, maɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u ko~u finawɾan to~uja ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja mitəko~uɾ ɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u itiraaj i ko~uħko~uħ a mimataŋaj ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj, mipataj ʦi *ao~u ʦħəŋjao~u iiŋ, misimawaj ʦi ɾio~u~u ɬ~ɮəjo~uo~u~u ato~u so~ufitaj itija. i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, maɾito~usa to~u ko~u so~ufitaj a iɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, siikəɬ~ɮ pasitimo~uɾ pasiʡamis miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ. nano~uja maɾəkapo~ut to~u kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u ŋajŋaj ʦi *ħaŋ *ħao~uħo~u~ui, ʦħən *o~uŋxian maɾəkatəp, nai sawaɾian saʡətaɾ pijaʦo~un, kaʦawan a nijaro~uʡ, itija kaɾaɾɾo~uɬ~ɮan a miʦamo~uɾ mikapo~ut, saiko~ur maɾəŋat to~u ko~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak. itija sawaɾian sao~uwaʦaj kasanijaro~uʡ a ʡamis finaʦaɬ~ɮan, tawo~u~uɾo~uŋ finaʦaɬ~ɮan masasiʦo~uwat, miɾiɾis miɾəfək to~u pikaʦawan so~ufitaj no~u manʦin, matiraaj saka, iko~ur itiraaj i po~uso~uŋ saʡətaɾ a piwma ɾikapo~un ŋasaw mikiħatija to~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ. (*) kaʡamisaj ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ: taɾaʡamis ko~u so~ufitaj miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ tajra i kaɾiŋko~u minato~u, * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, taʦo~u~uaŋ a finawɾan saɾo~uŋan **** tamɬ~ɮaw mʦaɾap to~u ɾijisan no~u ko~uto~ufo~uki, maɾo~uwiɬ~ɮ ko~u maɾitəmo~uħ a so~ufitaj no~u manʦin. i ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, itiraaj po~usko~u a ʡamis a saɾo~uŋan **** tamɬ~ɮaw mikiħatija a miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, o~u finawɾan nai ʦipao~ukan miɾo~uʡis i pikaʦawan waŋ tiŋkai a minato~u no~u kaɾiŋko~u a so~ufitaj, misiʡajaw to~u sako~utan a miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ ato~u ni ɾi ɬ~ɮəsħəŋ a so~ufitaj ko~u piʦo~uraʡ miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, nano~uja maʦaʦo~uraʡ to~u kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u minato~u ʦi ʦħən ɬ~ɮəji ato~u ʦikaso~uan tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u piɾao~up, mapatajaj finawɾan ira ko~u ** tamɬ~ɮaw, kaʡaisaj a ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ nano~uja patərəp sato~u. (*) katimo~uɾaj ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ: katimo~uɾaj miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i ɬ~ɮafɬ~ɮaf no~u po~uso~uŋ, maɾəkatəp to~u piwma finaʦaɬ~ɮan ɾikafo~un ŋasaw, paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u misaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaħaɾ to~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, miʦaɾapan to~uɬ~ɮo~uħan ko~u kaitiraan no~u tapatapaŋ, ɾo~ujo~ukan ko~u so~ufitaj. pasitimo~uɾ ko~u finawɾan so~ufitaj i piwma kaitiraan, * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, taʦo~u~uaŋ ato~u ɾikafo~un saŋasaw saɾo~uŋan **** tamɬ~ɮaw miɾijo~uk to~u so~ufitaj ni *ħaŋ *ħao~uɾian, * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ʦi ɬ~ɮiŋ ro~u~uʦħaŋ ħaki rijar no~u po~uso~uŋ ko~u ɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u pikifian no~u ɾikafo~un ŋasaw, i ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ to~u ɬ~ɮafak, piɾiʡan ko~u so~ufitaj no~u manʦin to~u *** ko~u ʦiʡiʦəɾaj, paʡaʦa to~u pajso~u, iɾəʦaɬ~ɮ to~u so~ufitaj ni ɬ~ɮiŋ ro~u~uʦħaŋ a miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, saka aɾo~uwiɬ~ɮ ko~u * pikifian miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u paŋpaŋan ŋasaw. i ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ʦi ɾi ɬ~ɮiŋmiŋ, wan *o~u~uo~ub~b~vən, ɬ~ɮiŋ ro~u~uʦħaŋ, wo~u~u ħo~uŋɾo~u~uo~u ɾaʦino~uwas sa ko~u ʦo~uraʡ, miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, miɾo~ujo~uk to~u ɾikafo~un, tamaɾakao~u ŋasaw, ʦimapatajaj no~u ŋasaw saɾo~uŋan *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw, saki piwma a ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ nano~uja sa paħərək. iko~ur, o~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj no~u manʦin ʦi ɾi ɬ~ɮiŋmiŋ a tamina, tatapaŋan no~u so~ufitaj i tajwan ʦi wan *o~u~uo~ub~b~vən, ʡamisan tamina *ħijo~u~uan, *iŋjo~u~uan. to~usaaj tamina a so~ufitaj paɾa rijaraj sakapo~ut, pasaʡamis miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ taŋasa i kaɾiŋko~u minato~u, taɾatimo~uɾ iɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u piwma sako~uwan, nano~uja o~u ŋaŋaj finaʦaɬ~ɮan, jinʦo~u~umin, sao~uwaʦaj kasanijaro~uʡ ŋasaw ʡamis finaʦaɬ~ɮan, tao~u~uɾo~uŋ finaʦaɬ~ɮan, pajraŋ mimataŋaj miʦao~uɾ i kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan. na saɾifo~uŋ a saɬ~ɮama ko~u kataɾasəkaɾ miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, taŋasa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ko~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ itija maɾo~uwiɬ~ɮ, to~uja miħəʦaan ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ paħərək ko~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak. masaʡsaʡ ko~u na ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, kinsa ħan ko~u ŋaŋan ħaɾo~u ko~uħko~uħan ʦi *ħaŋ *ħao~uħo~u~ui, ʦħən *o~uŋxian (kanto~unis tamɬ~ɮaw), taʦo~u~uaŋ kakəriɬ~ɮan ʦi ɬ~ɮo~u~u xiŋfaŋ, ɾio~u~u ro~uŋ, ato~u po~usko~u, ŋajŋaj (jiɾan piʦən), kaʦawan a jinʦo~u~umin kakəriɬ~ɮan. o~upi "taŋafo~uɾan ko~u miŋafo~uɾaj" piɾitaɬ~ɮo~u to~u ʦikaso~uan ʡamis ko~u mami "ko~uraʦ" to~u nijaħ sana ɬ~ɮəmak . iko~uraj piʦaɾiwan minəŋnəŋ *.** pinəŋnəŋan to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ *. . pəɬ~ɮia.ʦɾo~uo~u~uɬ~ɮ.əɬ~ɮo~u~u.tw. (****-**-**). (***********-**-**).
